repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: The current failure for ca6k_04616 is a build error due to redefinition of 'class ge::op::Ca6k04616Custom' in autogen/op_proto.h from duplicate REG_OP. All selected memories (ca6k_04615, ca6k_00322, ca6k_00285, ca6k_00296, ca6k_00045) share the same root cause: duplicate operator registration caused by manually adding REG_OP/OpDef when autogen already generates it. The ca6k_04615 entry is especially relevant as its operator number is adjacent, and the others reinforce the same pattern across various ca6k operators.
